meta.intent: Punish the instinct to finish the visually open high rescue first by pairing it with a lower puppy that is obviously more buried and meaningfully closer to the next flood rows.
meta.expectedPath: Ignore the tempting near-finished top puppy, route into the buried lower puppy first, then cash the simple top rescue once the water risk is removed.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player takes the almost-free top rescue, spends several actions feeling smart, and then realizes the lower puppy has become the real losing clock.
meta.whatItProves: Rescue order remains legible even when the board tempts the wrong answer.
meta.notes: The top target needs only one meaningful clear; the lower target is the true exam.
